prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Monte Carlo simulation using a Geometric Brownian Motion model. Historical daily log returns for ZTS over the last 5 years were used to estimate the drift (mean daily return) and volatility (standard deviation of daily returns). With an estimated daily drift of 0.0002 and daily volatility of 0.0134, 10000 simulations were run for 21 days. The point estimate is the median of the simulated prices, and the confidence intervals are derived from the corresponding percentiles of the simulated price distribution.
